news-global-econ.title: Our fallen heroes' families deserve more than outdated survivor benefits
news-global-econ.description: Gold Star families face emotional and financial hardship after losing a loved one in service. New legislation aims to increase the death gratuity.

news-global-econ.title: School choice is booming and families are winning as the education cartel crumbles
news-global-econ.description: As the Trump administration winds down the Department of Education, a school choice revolution gains momentum with over 1.3 million students enrolled.

news-global-econ.title: DoorDash data offers snapshot of economy voters are feeling ahead of midterms
news-global-econ.description: A new DoorDash report reveals families are spending more strategically as prices stabilize, with affordability varying significantly across U.S. cities.

news-global-econ.title: I'm a drone CEO. Our skies are dangerously exposed — here's the solution
news-global-econ.description: A Digital Flight Authorization System could replace fragmented drone approval processes with real-time verification of operators and missions.

news-global-soc.title: Bruce Springsteen blasts rich men in America as critics call out his billions
news-global-soc.description: Bruce Springsteen sparks controversy with a fiery anti-Trump speech, but critics point out his reported $1.2 billion net worth undercuts his message.

news-global-soc.title: Shipping Remains Slow at Strait of Hormuz Despite Ceasefire
news-global-soc.description: Ship-tracking services reported on Thursday that traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains at less than 10 percent of its normal level, despite Iran ostensibly promising to halt terror attacks on civilian vessels as part of its ceasefire agreement with the…

news-global-soc.title: Trump Warns Iran Over Strait of Hormuz Tanker Fees
news-global-soc.description:
President Donald Trump warned Iran on Thursday against charging fees on tanker ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
The post Trump Warns Iran Over Strait of Hormuz Tanker Fees appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: UK defense minister warns Putin of 'serious consequences' after covert underwater military operation
news-global-soc.description: U.K. Defense Minister John Healey has revealed a major military operation involving the Royal Navy and Norway to deter Russian submarines in the North Sea.
